sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed after ACTION7
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

char_blue = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'b'][0]
char_yellow = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'Y'][0]

print(f"After ACTION7:")
print(f"  Blue char boundary: {char_blue['boundary']}")
print(f"  Yellow char boundary: {char_yellow['boundary']}")

# Compare with previous frame
if previous_frame:
    prev_seg = previous_frame.segmentation
    prev_nodes = prev_seg['nodes']
    prev_blue = [n for n in prev_nodes if n['color'] == 'b'][0]
    prev_yellow = [n for n in prev_nodes if n['color'] == 'Y'][0]
    print(f"\nBefore ACTION7:")
    print(f"  Blue char boundary: {prev_blue['boundary']}")
    print(f"  Yellow char boundary: {prev_yellow['boundary']}")

# Check green block count
green_nodes = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'N']
print(f"\nGreen blocks: {len(green_nodes)}")

# Check all node colors
from collections import Counter
color_counts = Counter(n['color'] for n in nodes)
print(f"Color counts: {dict(color_counts)}")

# Look at the ascii around where changes might have happened
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print(f"\nRow 1 (top green): {ascii_lines[1][10:35]}")
print(f"Row 2: {ascii_lines[2][10:35]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
